source_name: AEMO Integrated System Plan - headline forecasts
notes: AEMO 2024 Integrated System Plan states that around 10,000 km of transmission will be needed by 2050 under the Step Change and Progressive Change scenarios, with around 5,000 km in the next decade. This is a rounded planning forecast, not current built transmission.
source_rights: AEMO terms of use for tabular data
citation: Australian Energy Market Operator, 2024 Integrated System Plan for the National Electricity Market.
